name: Andrey Smirnov
description:
The black rose was Anastasia's favorite flower- symbolizing mystery, elegance, and strength, much like her soul. With tears shining in her eyes, she accepted his proposal.

Their marriage became their sanctuary. Despite the shadows of the mafia world, they built moments of peace together. Andrey kept his ruthlessness for his enemies while Anastasia filled their home with warmth and light. They woke up together, ate together, and silently promised to protect one another from the world

outside.But fate was merciless. Anastasia fell ill, battling cancer at a heartbreakingly young age. Andrey sought every doctor in Moscow, every healer, every possible remedy... but nothing could save her.

She died in Anarey Smirnov had risen through Moscow s dark underworld at a young age. By the time he was twenty-five, he was already feared and respected-known for both his sharp mind and his ruthless execution. Yet beneath his hard, unbreakable exterior, there was a part of him no one in the criminal world ever saw: the part capable of love.

The woman who changed Andrey's life was Anastasia Petrova.

He first saw her in a famous Moscow art gallery. Anastasia's crystal-blue eyes, the graceful way she moved, and the warmth hidden in her smile illuminated the entire room. In that moment, something inside Andrey shifted. For the first time, the feared mafia lord felt the tremble of vulnerability in his heart.

Andrey used every ounce of charm he possessed to win her attention. Anastasia did not know he was a mafia boss; to her, he was simply a mysterious, strong man who looked at her as if she were the only person in the world. Andrey protected that illusion fully, wanting her to see the man he could, ot the monster the

streets had created.is arms.
